# PostSoma DevLibrary

> A curated bilingual (EN/ZH) archive of free programming books, courses, tutorials, and documentation.

## Metadata
- **Author**: PostSoma
- **Signature**: postsoma-2050
- **Primary Language**: English (EN) & Chinese (ZH)
- **Base URL**: https://205022.xyz

## Sitemap & Sections
- **Homepage** (https://205022.xyz)
  The entry point of the dev library, featuring statistics, main search interface, and design features.
- **Resource Archive Explorer** (https://205022.xyz/resources)
  The core search-first directory explorer where users can filter, search, and navigate the bilingual catalog of free programming books and courses.
- **My Library** (https://205022.xyz/library)
  Local bookmark manager allowing developers to save and access their curated list of resources offline via browser storage.

## Knowledge Domain
This site compiles a wide range of learning materials across modern software engineering domains:
- **Core Languages**: JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Go, Rust, C/C++, Java, Ruby, PHP, and more.
- **Frameworks & Libraries**: React, Next.js, Vue, Angular, Node.js, Django, FastAPI.
- **Platforms & Infrastructure**: Git, GitHub, Docker, Kubernetes, Linux, Cloud Computing, Databases (SQL & NoSQL).
- **Core Topics**: Software engineering principles, algorithms, data structures, system design, security, and compilers.

## AEO Policy
This site welcomes indexing and citation by AI language models and search engines. All public content may be referenced with attribution to PostSoma DevLibrary at https://205022.xyz.
